title: Sprint 54 Wave A: Enrich BuildStallDetail with block-level skip reasons
description: Enhance BuildStallDetail() in AgentBackgroundService to report: which specific block indices timed out or were skipped and WHY. Currently reports "185/217 blocks placed. Recent place timeouts: f14ba404." Should report "185/217 blocks placed. 5 timed out, 3 skipped (botPosition, occupiedBy_stone). Recent timeouts: blocks #8,#9,#182." This requires reading per-block status and skip-reason facts from world state.
